title: Senior SEO Specialist at Flipkart Global Group

jsonLd.title: Senior SEO Specialist at Flipkart Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Flipkart Global Group, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a SEO Specialist for our Gurgaon operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Flipkart Global Group:
Flipkart Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Flipkart Global Group!
